scenarios.description: child(0) on element with no children should throw IndexOutOfBoundsException (childNodeSize == 0 branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); // no children
pseudocode: TEST TC01 child on empty children

scenarios.description: child(-1) on element with one child should throw IndexOutOfBoundsException (negative index boundary)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("span"));

scenarios.description: child(0) returns only element child when childNodes contains mixed node types (filters out non-Element)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("text")); parent.appendChild(new Element("p")); parent.appendChild(new Comment("c"));
scenarios.expectedResult:
return value is the

element instance
pseudocode: TEST TC03 child with mixed children

scenarios.description: child(0) returns first element when exactly one element child present
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ul"); parent.appendChild(new Element("li"));
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the <li> element instance

scenarios.description: child(1) returns second element when multiple element children present
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ol"); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); Element second = parent.appendElement("li");
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the second <li> element instance

scenarios.description: child(2) with index equal to filtered element count should throw IndexOutOfBoundsException (upper bound)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("span")); parent.appendChild(new Element("a"));
pseudocode: TEST TC06 child index at size

scenarios.description: child(0) after caching ensures shadowChildrenRef is reused on subsequent calls
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendElement("span"); // first builds cache
scenarios.expectedResult: first and second calls return same instance; shadowChildrenRef populated
